title: 12Pcs Christmas Poinsettia Flower Artificial Pointsettia with Clips Christmas Glitter Poinsettia Ornaments Christmas Tree Flower Decorations, DIY Xmas Wreath Holiday Party Decor (Gold)
features: 【Package included】you will receive 12pieces glitter poinsettia flowers 12 pcs metal clips 12pcs stems;

【Suitable size】The diameter of the poinsettia flower is approximate 13cm . The set come with clips (2.5cm/0.98in). They are pretty and you can easily attach them to Christmas tree ,Christmas wreath or garlands and to make them more evenly distributed.

【Material】These Artificial Poinsettia are made from high quality silk and plastic with glitter powder, lightweight and easy to carry and store. The glitter design which make your christmas tree or other decoration more attractive, add a stronger festive atmosphere.

【Easy to use】Each poinsettia flowers match a clip that is very easy for your flower fix on your decoration, easy to use and place. Great decoration for your Christmas tree, house, Christmas wreaths, Christmas garland, Mall decoration and other Christmas decorations.

【Wide applications】You can used on swags, wreaths, gift toppers, added to poinsettia plant for fullness, also added in bushes outside. It can be clamped on whatever decoration you want, no matter Christmas tree, wreath or gift box, notes and cards. The poinsettia flowers also good for decorating on wedding party, birthday party, New Year's holiday decoration, photography scene setting or other festivals.
